sectiondef.header: Event codes for Renesas RA4E2 Event Link Controller (ELC).

briefdescription.para: A/D scan end interrupt for group B.
High priority rx data buffer full.
High priority tx data buffer empty.

sectiondef.header: Renesas RA ELC possible peripherals to be linked to event signals

briefdescription.para: Renesas RA4E2 Event Link Controller (ELC) definitions.
